according to little-endian order.

jdk.incubator.vector/Vector/reinterpretS.name: reinterpretShape
signatures: public abstract<F> Vector<F> reinterpretShape(VectorSpecies<F> species, int part)
jdk.incubator.vector/Vector/reinterpretS.description:
Transforms this vector to a vector of the given species of
element typeF, reinterpreting the bytes of this
vector without performing any value conversions.

info.excerpt:
Transforms this vector to a vector of the given species of
element typeF, reinterpreting the bytes of this
vector without performing any value conversions.
